PreToolUse.//: Teams HTML lint — auto-discovered when comms is enabled (no settings.json edit). Matcher keys on the tool-name SUFFIX so an MCP namespace rehost (mcp__claude_ai_yl-msoffice__* -> mcp__plugin_yl-msoffice_yl-msoffice__*) cannot silently disable it. Scoped to the yl-msoffice server; the script further guards teams/channel for execute_action and skips send_email + all reads.

hooks.command: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/teams-html-lint.py"; else python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/teams-html-lint.py"; fi
